text:
SHORT NAME: EXHST_DT 

LONG NAME: BENE_MDCR_BNFT_EXHST_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field comes from the highest benefits exhausted date that is present on the claim records 
included in the stay. 

It is null/missing if benefits were not exhausted during the stay.
